title: chamaecrista oligandra
intro: Chamaecrista oligandra, also known as sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a species of flowering plant in the bean family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Chamaecrista oligandra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies.
